title: catalpa × erubescens
intro: Catalpa × erubescens, also known as the catalpa hybrid or Japanese catalpa, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to China and Japan, belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Catalpa × erubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Catalpa × erubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
